conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Looking at gym options -- a big-box gym, a boutique studio, and just building a home gym.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The big-box gym is cheapest by far and has the most equipment variety.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: A home gym would be the most convenient but the upfront cost for equipment is steep.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to get my annual eye exam scheduled.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The boutique studio is pricier but the tiny group sizes seem like they'd keep me more accountable than working out alone.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Finally scheduled the eye exam for next week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Tried a trial class at the boutique studio, the instructor actually remembered my name by the second session.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Still not sure it's worth the extra cost over the big-box gym membership.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My car's check engine light came on, need to get that looked at.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Realized I've skipped the gym way less since starting the boutique studio trial compared to my old big-box membership.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Signed up for a membership at the boutique studio. The small class sizes and the accountability from the instructor knowing my name made the extra cost worth it.

query: Which gym did the user decide to join?
